varChoiceText.title: varChoiceText
varChoiceText.description: List of available advisory segments for the selected day. Each segment includes InteractionId and Market Event Title. Used when multiple segments are found.

varSelectedInteractionId.title: varSelectedInteractionId
varSelectedInteractionId.description: The InteractionId of the advisory segment when only one segment is found. This is used to directly proceed with approval.

varStatus.title: varStatus
varStatus.description: Indicates the number of advisory segments found for the selected day. Possible values are NONE, SINGLE, or MULTIPLE. Used by the agent to decide the next step.
